# **Introducing Quantinuum Helios**
‍
## Where Limits End and Possibilities Dawn
Access Now
[Access Now](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/quantinuum-systems/helios#access)
##  **A massive leap** in our world-leading Quantinuum Systems
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/690a34f6aefa808f28cafdf8_HeliosChip_Statics_Angle_v0072_opt.avif)
**Quantinuum Helios** , Powered by Honeywell, is the world’s most accurate quantum computer. A scientific and engineering marvel – Helios redefines what’s possible.
With the highest fidelity logical qubits, a [**next-generation software stack**](https://www.quantinuum.com/blog/built-for-all-introducing-our-new-software-stack) featuring a modern, high-level programming language called Guppy, and NVIDIA GPUs integrated right into the control system, Helios is designed to accelerate quantum computing adoption by enterprises. 
The Helios platform is now available to customers through Quantinuum’s cloud service and on-premises offering.
[Access Helios Now](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/quantinuum-systems/helios#access)
### 98
fully-connected qubits
### 50
LOGICAL QUBITS
### 99.9975%
single-qubit gate fidelity
### 99.921%
two-qubit gate fidelity
## Welcome to the era of useful quantum computing
Explore how our customers and partners are unlocking commercial value with Helios.
### [JPMorganChase & Co.: Future Proofing Data Security ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6908c89151f1d9dc2c3b723e_arrow.png) ](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/quantinuum-systems/helios#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-0)### [BMW GROUP: Advancing Sustainable Mobility ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6908c89151f1d9dc2c3b723e_arrow.png) ](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/quantinuum-systems/helios#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-1)### [SOFTBANK CORP.: Accelerating Battery Development ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6908c89151f1d9dc2c3b723e_arrow.png) ](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/quantinuum-systems/helios#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-2)### [Amgen: Data-driven Discovery in Biologics ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6908c89151f1d9dc2c3b723e_arrow.png) ](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/quantinuum-systems/helios#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-3)
JPMorganChase & Co.
Researching potential capabilities for advanced financial analytics.
BMW Group
Advancing sustainable mobility through materials research on fuel cell catalysts.
SoftBank Corp.
Exploring organic materials for next-gen battery, optical switch, and solar cells.
Amgen
An investor and research collaborator, applying hybrid quantum-machine learning to advance data-driven discovery in biologics
## The unprecedented power and precision of Helios
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/66df38a5a108b2822b941b3e_newchipdesign.svg)
New chip design: 
Faster and more accurate
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6908bb346b34b3eea353087c_logical-qubit%201.png)
50 logical qubits:
98 physical qubits
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/66b4d8183334ac1c22c56b70_icon_helios_higherfid.svg)
Higher-fidelity:
more accurate operations
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/66b4d818c121a8f8bdd9a96d_icon_helios_power.svg)
Power consumption:
less than 40kW
_* Valid for the base unit without support infrastructure_
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6908bb8894553f17662635c3_GPU%201.png)
Equipped with the world’s fastest GPU:
NVIDIA Grace HopperTM Box
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/669960f53cd73aedb80c8eea/6908bbc7bbe2c810282ad02e_stack%201.png)
Next-gen software stack:
Improved time-to-solution and reduced memory error
## **Helios at work**
Exploring High-Temperature Superconductivity at an unprecedented level
Short-lived room temperature superconductivity has been observed in laser-excited materials​. Understanding this phenomena could bring us closer to designing room-temperature superconductors​. We simulated a lattice excited by a laser pulse​, and observed a crucial signature of superconductivity - all in a system so large it significantly frustrates classical methods.
[Read the Paper](https://www.arxiv.org/abs/2511.02125)[Read The Blogpost](https://www.quantinuum.com/blog/helios-delivers-quantum-advantage-with-real-world-impact)[](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/quantinuum-systems/helios)
Leaders in Benchmarking
We continued our tradition of thorough benchmarking and full transparency for our customers and users. In addition to our industry-leading results in standard component benchmarking, we measured record-breaking system level performance benchmarks like Random Circuit Sampling (RCS).
[Read the Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.05465)[Read the blogpost](https://www.quantinuum.com/blog/introducing-helios-the-most-accurate-quantum-computer-in-the-world)[](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/quantinuum-systems/helios)
Space Advantage with JPMorganChase
We worked with our partners at JPMorganChase to leverage a new-industry-first feature called "gate streaming" to explore a type of quantum advantage called space advantage. The team showed how, in a streaming model (where large amounts of data is streamed through a processor), a quantum computer can solve problems that would otherwise require very large or infeasible amounts of memory on classical computers.
[Read the Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.03689)[](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/quantinuum-systems/helios)[](https://www.quantinuum.com/products-solutions/quantinuum-systems/helios)
#### Start your journey
#### with **Helios** , the world’s most powerful quantum computer
